title: pleocnemia heterophylla
intro: Pleocnemia heterophylla, also known as the Himalayan fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pleocnemia heterophylla include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
